host.label: SMTP Host
host.help: The hostname or IP address of your SMTP server.

port.label: SMTP Port
port.help: The port number for your SMTP server. Common ports: 25 (default), 587 (TLS), 465 (SSL).

secure.label: Encryption
secure.help: The encryption method to use for SMTP connection.

from.label: From Address
from.help: The email address that emails will be sent from.

fromName.label: From Name
fromName.help: The name that will appear as the sender.

to.label: Default To Address
to.help: Default recipient email address for test emails.

sendDelay.label: Send Delay (ms)
sendDelay.help: Delay in milliseconds between emails during bulk sending. Use to avoid SMTP rate limits. 0 = no delay.

maxPerHour.label: Max Emails Per Hour
maxPerHour.help: Maximum number of emails that can be sent per hour. Queued emails will wait until the next hour when the limit is reached. 0 = unlimited.

maxPerDay.label: Max Emails Per Day
maxPerDay.help: Maximum number of emails that can be sent per day. Queued emails will wait until the next day when the limit is reached. 0 = unlimited.
